function.name: pc_screenshot
function.description: Capture a screenshot of a PC display for visual verification only. Do NOT use this as the primary way to control the PC — use system_run or pc_ui_elements + pc_activate instead. Reserve pc_screenshot for: confirming a task completed visually, reading content that has no accessible text, or diagnosing unexpected UI states.

display.description: Display index to capture (default: 0 = primary monitor).
